name: CB Parks & Recreation Dept.
description: CB Parks & Recreation Dept. is a place to play pickleball in Council Bluffs, IA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Charles E. Lakin YMCA
description: Charles E. Lakin YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Council Bluffs, IA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Cochran Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cochran Park in Council Bluffs, IA! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Iowa West Field House
description: Iowa West Field House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Council Bluffs, IA. There are 6 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available.

name: Kimball Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kimball Park in Council Bluffs, IA! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court. Players have access to lights.

name: Neola Area Community Center
description: Neola Area Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Neola, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: The Hub Patio
description: The Hub Patio has amazing drinks, food, patio, full bar, mini bowling and best of all Pickleball.  Enjoy our new outdoor court and have the best of two worlds.  The Hub Patio offers a full bar and food menu, restrooms, tables, shaded seating and other outdoor patio games!  Bring your kids, friends or family to watch your pickleball match and they will also be entertained on our patio! Players can bring their own paddles or use one of ours.  We provide paddles and balls!
fees: Private — $25 for one hour court rental; comes with paddles and balls

name: YMCA Healthy Living Center
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA Healthy Living Center in Council Bluffs, IA! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A membership is required to play.
